text:
(PPV) - Reason Not Received This field indicates the reason why the PPV was not received from the agency during this episode of care. 01 = Offered and declined
02 = Assessed and determined to have medical contraindication(s)
03 = Not indicated; patient does not meet age/condition guidelines for Pneumococcal Vaccine
04 = None of the above CHAR 2 x x x x x
M1309_NBR_STG2_AT_SOC_ROC M1309 (M1308) Number Of Pressure Ulcers - Stage II At SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unhealed
